Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Steven Kremer, Esq. for Plaintiff: Standish Sibley, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Siane H. Eteaki, aka Siale Hettic Eteaki, DSI Construction, and Sharp Construction as follows:
Damages $338,272.00
Costs $394.84, for a total of $338,666.84
Judgment signed in open court.
